name: Firm Precedent Generator (Practical Law Replacement)
description: Generate a firm-specific standard form document from the firm's own knowledge store and playbook cascade. Produces a complete first-draft in the firm's voice. Replaces Thomson Reuters Practical Law Standard Documents, LexisNexis PSL (£15–25k/yr), and HighQ precedent vaults.
promptTemplate: Generate a {{documentType}} precedent for our client. Acting for: {{actingFor}}. Jurisdiction: {{jurisdiction}}. Practice area: {{practiceArea}}. Apply the full playbook cascade and embed firm red lines. {{description}}

substitutions.description: Include any deal-specific special instructions here.
